title: [Beacon Hall, Locker]
description: Rows of lockers line the shelves along the walls of this compact space.  Your locker has been removed from the shelf above and sits ready for you on a sturdy counter.

wayto.18888: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go opening'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go opening'; end
